name: Fey Dragonet Liqueur (Lesser)
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

Each draft of fey dragonet liqueur has a different flavor. For 1 hour after you drink it, you can use a single action to breathe out a of euphoric gas. Each creature in the cone must attempt a save. After you expel this magical breath, you can't do so again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Fey Dragonet Liqueur]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is Stupefied 1 for 1 round.

Failure The creature is stupefied 1 for 1 minute and Slowed 1 for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The creature is Stupefied 2 and slowed 1 for 1 minute.
